news.title: This laser turns metal into a star-like plasma in trillionths of a second
news.summary: In a striking glimpse into extreme physics, scientists have captured the split-second chaos that unfolds when powerful laser flashes blast matter into a superheated plasma. By combining two cutting-edge lasers, researchers were able to trac
